mapper.select: SELECT j.title AS title, COUNT(e.job_id) AS objectCount FROM job j LEFT JOIN emp_info e ON j.id = e.job_id GROUP BY j.id, j.title ORDER BY COUNT(e.job_id)
SELECT d.name AS title, COUNT(e.dept_id) AS objectCount FROM dept d LEFT JOIN emp_info e ON d.id = e.dept_id GROUP BY d.id, d.name ORDER BY COUNT(e.dept_id)
SELECT CONCAT(sex, '性') AS title, COUNT(sex) AS objectCount FROM emp_info GROUP BY sex
SELECT c.class_name AS title, COUNT(s.class_id) AS objectCount FROM class c LEFT JOIN student s ON c.id = s.class_id GROUP BY c.id, c.class_name ORDER BY COUNT(s.class_id) LIMIT 7
SELECT e.education_name AS title, COUNT(s.education_id) AS objectCount FROM education e LEFT JOIN student s ON e.id = s.education_id GROUP BY e.id, e.education_name ORDER BY COUNT(s.education_id)
